description: Sensors on a low-clearance bridge detect a vehicle that is too tall to pass safely. An operator must intervene.

nodes.task_description: Receive an 'Over-Height Vehicle' alert from the 'Old Mill Bridge' sensor system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the immediate traffic hazard alert.

nodes.task_description: Immediately activate the flashing warning lights and the 'Turn Back Now' dynamic message sign on the approach to the bridge.

expected_outcome.value: Agent activates the warning systems to stop the truck.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a police unit to the location to assist the truck in turning around safely.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends police to manage the traffic situation.
